name: migrate-deps
description: Migration pack: move off a deprecated/vulnerable dependency onto a supported one, gate-passing and eval-scored.

files.content:
# Steering — {{TITLE}}

Goal: replace a deprecated or vulnerable dependency with a supported alternative without behavior change.

Conventions:
- Every removed/added dependency is justified in design.md.
- No public API change unless a requirement demands it.
- Prove behavior parity with the existing test suite before and after.

# Tasks — {{TITLE}} (template)

Task DAG shape (fill in `files:` and `verify:` per your repo):

- T1 Inventory current usages of the old dependency. deps: —
- T2 Introduce the replacement behind the same seams. deps: T1
- T3 Migrate call sites module-by-module. deps: T2
- T4 Remove the old dependency; prove parity. deps: T3
